content_md: Team — last Saturday 22 of you showed up at Central Texas Food Bank's mobile pantry and helped serve 410 families. Special thanks to Janelle and Reza for jumping into the produce table on day one — half an hour in they were running it themselves. As Maria from CTFB put it: *"You all moved faster than my regular Saturday crew, which is saying something."* The Friday pre-sort idea worked; we'll keep it. Q2 warehouse sort is on the calendar — April 18, signups open Monday. Reply if you want a spot. — Maya
